attributes.action: Abandon drive smart for motability customers over 30
attributes.additional_details: Scrap the drive smart scheme for over 25
attributes.background: Drive smart for motability doesn’t take the habits of disabled drivers into consideration . Most blackboxes end when a driver is 21-25 so why penalize older drivers

rejection.details:
We can only accept petitions about things the Government or Parliament are directly responsible for.

Decisions about this are a matter for the Motability Foundation, not the UK Government or Parliament.
